summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Flight QFU Tracker. Backend fully functional with all 17 tests passing. Frontend loads but has UI display issue preventing results from showing after search.

minor.issue: Pydantic model defined temperature and dewpoint as int, but aviationweather.gov API returns floats. FIXED during testing.
minor.fix_applied: Changed MetarData model fields from Optional[int] to Optional[float] for temperature and dewpoint

ui_bugs.issue: After clicking search button or selecting airport from suggestions, the runway status results do not display. App remains on empty state despite API returning data successfully.
ui_bugs.details: API calls work correctly (verified with curl and backend tests). Frontend receives data but does not render results. Possible state management or conditional rendering issue.

integration_issues.issue: Search functionality works (suggestions appear), but results page does not render after selection
integration_issues.root_cause: Likely issue with data state update or conditional rendering in index.tsx. The 'data' state may not be updating properly after API response.

test_categories.airports_endpoint: 3/3 passed - Returns 122 airports, includes LFLL (Lyon), has required fields
test_categories.airport_detail_endpoint: 3/3 passed - LFLL and LFPG details correct, 404 for invalid airports
test_categories.search_endpoint: 3/3 passed - Search for LYON returns LFLL, PARIS returns LFPG, JFK returns KJFK
test_categories.runway_status_endpoint: 7/7 passed - Structure correct, METAR data present with all fields, QFU directions shown, 2000ft AGL threshold verified, KJFK working after fix

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix frontend results display issue - investigate why data state is not triggering re-render after API call
Check fetchRunwayStatus function in index.tsx - verify setData(result) is being called
Add error handling UI to show if API calls fail
Verify loading state is properly managed during API calls
Test the selectAirport function to ensure it calls fetchRunwayStatus correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: All endpoints working correctly with proper error handling
Backend: 20km radius for landing detection correctly implemented (line 1991)
Backend: METAR integration working with all required fields (wind_direction, wind_speed, expected_runway_from_wind, visibility, temperature, dewpoint, flight_category, clouds)
Backend: 122 airports in database including LFLL (Lyon)
Frontend: Search input and suggestions working correctly
Frontend: CRITICAL BUG - Results not displaying after search. API returns data but UI does not update
Frontend: Text/Map toggle and Auto-refresh button not visible (likely because results are not displaying)
Frontend: TypeScript interfaces correctly defined and match backend models
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed MetarData model (temperature and dewpoint changed from int to float)
/app/frontend/app/index.tsx - Updated MetarData interface to match backend (added comments)

success_rate.frontend: 40% (Search and suggestions work, but results display fails)

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - app uses real-time data from OpenSky Network and aviationweather.gov APIs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional and tested. The critical issue is in the frontend - the search results do not display after clicking search or selecting an airport. The API calls are working (verified with curl), but the UI does not update. Check the data state management in index.tsx, specifically the fetchRunwayStatus function and how setData is being called. The issue is likely in the conditional rendering logic or state update after API response.

verified_requirements.lfll_lyon_included: ✅ PASS - LFLL (Lyon-Saint Exupéry) present in airport list
verified_requirements.2000ft_agl_threshold: ✅ PASS - Landing detection uses 2000ft AGL (verified in code line 1969 and test)
verified_requirements.20km_radius: ✅ PASS - Landing detection uses 20km radius (verified in code line 1991)
verified_requirements.metar_weather_data: ✅ PASS - METAR data includes wind_direction, wind_speed, expected_runway_from_wind, visibility, temperature, dewpoint, flight_category, clouds
verified_requirements.text_map_toggle: ⚠️ NOT VISIBLE - Toggle exists in code but not visible due to results display issue
verified_requirements.auto_refresh_button: ⚠️ NOT VISIBLE - Button exists in code but not visible due to results display issue
verified_requirements.qfu_directions: ✅ PASS - Active runways show QFU directions (e.g., 26R, 09L) verified in API response
verified_requirements.search_functionality: ⚠️ PARTIAL - Search input and suggestions work, but results don't display

bug_fixed_during_testing.issue: METAR data validation error - temperature and dewpoint fields
bug_fixed_during_testing.error: Pydantic ValidationError: Input should be a valid integer, got a number with a fractional part
bug_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: aviationweather.gov API returns temperature and dewpoint as floats (e.g., 11.1, 9.4), but Pydantic model expected integers
bug_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed MetarData model in server.py line 1715-1716 from Optional[int] to Optional[float]
bug_fixed_during_testing.verification: After fix, all 17 backend tests passed including KJFK which was failing before
